title: coreopsis tinctoria
intro: Coreopsis tinctoria, also known as the plains coreopsis or tickseed, is a flowering plant native to North America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and slender stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. The medicinal properties of Coreopsis tinctoria are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
